name: Each S-1 catalog entry declares the six operator-facing fields id name url tier applies_to fetch_frequency per §2.6 schema
command: node -e 'const y=require("fs").readFileSync(process.env.CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT+"/standards/sources.yaml","utf8");const blocks=y.split(/^- id: /m).slice(1);for(const b of blocks){for(const k of ["name","url","tier","applies_to","fetch_frequency"]){if(!new RegExp("^\\s*"+k+":","m").test(b))process.exit(1);}}process.exit(0)' && echo schema 1>&2
